description: Installs Simple Sticky Notes -- lightweight desktop sticky notes for Windows.

messages.notAdmin: This script requires admin privileges. Please run as Administrator.
messages.notFound: Simple Sticky Notes not found -- will install now
messages.installing: Installing Simple Sticky Notes via Chocolatey...
messages.notInPath: Simple Sticky Notes installed but executable not found in PATH (may need shell restart)
messages.disabled: Simple Sticky Notes install is disabled in config
messages.dataFolderSymlinked: Symlinked SSN data to custom folder: {path}
messages.dataFolderAlreadyLinked: SSN data folder already linked to: {path}
messages.dataFolderSkipped: Custom data folder config disabled -- using default location
messages.dataFolderFailed: Failed to set up custom data folder: {error}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
